notices.title: Online Admission Registration Open for 2026-2027
notices.content: Applications are invited for admissions to classes I to IX & XI. Fill out the online inquiry form to schedule an interactive session.

notices.title: U.P. Board & CBSE Board Examinations Merit List
notices.content: Congratulations to our toppers! St. D.B. Inter College & St. John Bosco School scholars achieve 100% success rate with top merit ranks.

notices.title: Annual Sports Meet - Bosco Shield 2026
notices.content: The annual sports championship event will commence on November 15th. Student registrations for tracks and field events open next week.

testimonials.name: Mollie Pereira
testimonials.content: The school provides an excellent learning environment. Security on campus is very good, making students feel safe. There are many extracurricular activities that keep students engaged and active. The faculty is highly specialized and professional, ensuring quality education.

testimonials.name: Samman Mishra
testimonials.content: An excellent educational experience with a strong emphasis on quality learning and holistic development. The school helped students grow not only academically but also through sports, life skills and personality development.

testimonials.name: R K Tiwari
testimonials.content: Professional faculty, relevant curriculum, resourceful library and a safe learning environment. Clean facilities and multiple opportunities help students achieve their full potential.

homepageContent.heroDescription: "48+ Years of Academic Excellence, Character Building and Student Success"

directorsMessage.name: Sabrina Coutinho
directorsMessage.message:
Dear Parents, Students and Well-Wishers,

Welcome to ST. D.B. Inter College & St. John Bosco School.

At our institution, education extends beyond textbooks and examinations. We are committed to nurturing young minds through academic excellence, strong values, discipline, creativity and character development.

Our goal is to create a learning environment where students are encouraged to think independently, act responsibly and grow into confident individuals prepared for future challenges.

We believe every child possesses unique potential, and through the combined efforts of dedicated educators, supportive families and a vibrant school community, that potential can be transformed into achievement.

We thank all parents and well-wishers for their continued trust and partnership in our educational journey.

gallery.title: Main Courtyard & Blocks
gallery.description: The primary academic courtyard of St. John Bosco School, Naini, Prayagraj.

gallery.title: Senior Wing Classrooms
gallery.description: Well-ventilated academic rooms located in the main red-and-white courtyard blocks.

gallery.title: Courtyard Gathering Assembly
gallery.description: The spacious open courtyard hosting school celebrations and morning assemblies.

gallery.title: Physical Gymnastics Stunts
gallery.description: Physical education demonstrations and balance exercises on courtyard mats.

gallery.title: Scholars Cabinet Assembly
gallery.description: Corridors linking classrooms where students collaborate on board preparations.

gallery.title: National Day Human Pyramid
gallery.description: Scholars building human pyramid formations holding the Indian flag.

gallery.title: Aerial Courtyard Formations
gallery.description: Aerial overview of student assemblies gathered around floral Rangoli patterns.

gallery.title: Official Faculty Council
gallery.description: Our certified teachers and administrative staff group photo.

gallery.title: Guest Flower Felicitation
gallery.description: Scholars welcoming distinguished chief guests on the academic stage.

gallery.title: School Drum Band March
gallery.description: Student band march in red carpet courtyard ceremony.

gallery.title: Town National Parade March
gallery.description: Parade march event in Naini, Prayagraj, celebrating Azadi Ka Amrit Mahotsav.

announcements.title: Founder's Day Celebration Golden Jubilee
announcements.content: St. John Bosco School marks 50 years of educational service in Naini, Prayagraj. Cultural performances and alumni meet to be held in courtyard.

announcements.title: Inter-School Science & Tech Exhibition Awards
announcements.content: Congratulations to our junior science cabinet scholars for winning the Prayagraj Science Innovation Shield.
